summary: Iteration 21 - Verified TransporterBot replacement of Crisp, pricing updates, and banner changes. All tests passed. Backend /api/chat endpoint working with Gemini AI. Frontend chatbot UI functional (toggle, window, input, send, close). Pricing shows correct values (39/189/489€ monthly, 390/1890/4890€ annual with ~32/157/407€/mois). Founder badge and banner text correct. Admin and Driver dashboards working.

ui_bugs.issue: Button may be partially covered by Emergent badge in bottom-right corner - requires JavaScript click to bypass overlay

passed_tests: Landing page loads at / - PASS
Urgency banner shows 'Tarif garanti jusqu'à l'homologation e-CMR' (data-testid='urgency-banner') - PASS
Chatbot toggle button visible (data-testid='chatbot-toggle') - PASS
No Crisp widget present (CrispChat replaced by TransporterBot) - PASS

Monthly prices: Solo 39€, Croissance 189€, Flotte Pro 489€ - PASS
Annual prices: Solo 390€/an (~32€/mois), Croissance 1 890€/an (~157€/mois), Flotte Pro 4 890€/an (~407€/mois) - PASS
FIREBASE_RULES.md exists with companyId cloisonnement rules - PASS
Admin login (admin@transporter-pro.com / admin123) - PASS
Admin dashboard shows Vue d'ensemble, Cash-Flow, Chauffeurs, Litiges, Éco-scores, Abonnement - PASS
Driver login (driver@test.com / driver123) - PASS
Driver dashboard shows Éco-score 85, Livraisons en cours, Terminées aujourd'hui - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: TransporterBot.jsx: Well-implemented with proper data-testid attributes, loading indicator (bouncing dots), and error handling
Backend /api/chat: Uses LlmChat with Emergent LLM Key and comprehensive SYSTEM_PROMPT covering tarifs, loi 2026, éco-score
App.js: CrispChat still imported but TransporterBot is rendered instead (line 145)
LandingPage.jsx: Pricing correctly shows -17% annual discount with 'Économisez 17%' label
FIREBASE_RULES.md: Contains both production rules (companyId cloisonnement) and simplified auth-only rules
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 verified: 1) TransporterBot.jsx replaces CrispChat as the chat widget - internal Gemini-powered AI that knows about tarifs (39/189/489€), loi 2026 (50€ amendes), éco-score (-15% carburant). Backend POST /api/chat uses LlmChat with session_id and system_message. 2) Pricing texts updated: 'Économisez 17%' toggle label, 'Tarif garanti à vie pour les Membres Fondateurs' badge. 3) Banner: 'Tarif garanti jusqu'à l'homologation e-CMR'. 4) FIREBASE_RULES.md updated with companyId-based rules. Note: The chatbot toggle button may be partially covered by the Emergent badge in the bottom-right corner - use JavaScript click to bypass. Console shows Firestore permission errors but app functions correctly.

mocked_apis.note: Gemini AI chat is real (Emergent LLM Key)
